name: Qwen-1.8B
license: Tongyi Qianwen RESEARCH LICENSE AGREEMENT (non-commercial by default; commercial use requires requesting a separate license from Alibaba)
archDisplay: Dense decoder-only transformer (RoPE, SwiGLU, RMSNorm), tied embeddings
note: Smallest Gen-1 model (2.2T tokens) aimed at edge/low-latency deployment; research-only license unless commercial terms are separately granted.

results.notes: 4-shot. Below the taxonomy's typical 20-100 display range for MATH, but is the number directly published in the official Qwen GitHub README's performance table for the 1.8B model, consistent with this being the smallest Gen-1 Qwen model.
3-shot. Below the taxonomy's typical 30-97 display range, but directly sourced from the same official README table as the other Qwen-1.8B scores already in the corpus.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real, released 2023-11-30 per GitHub README (same day as Qwen-72B). 1.8B params, research-only license (commercial requires separate contact) confirmed on HF model card. Native 8K/max 32K context confirmed. c-eval score of 56.2 specifically confirmed as the 'Test Set' figure on the HF card (Val set = 56.1, a different number) — the record's 'test set' note is correct and the number is not a typo of the val figure. mmlu 45.3, humaneval 15.2, gsm8k 32.3 all confirmed verbatim.
